name: Spiced Loquats
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the loquats, remove seeds, and measure out 2 quarts.
2. Steam the loquats in boiling water for 3 minutes to prevent shriveling.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (lemon slices, vinegar, whole cloves, cinnamon sticks, sugar, and salt) to the steamed loquats.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil and cook for 10 minutes.
5. Let the mixture stand overnight.
6. The next day, bring the mixture back to a boil again and continue cooking until the syrup thickens.
7. Pour into hot sterilized jars and seal.
8. Makes about 5 (1/2-pint) jars.
